CustomField.description: Enter the date the applicant completed their homebuyer education requirements, or the date of the homebuyer education certificate. If this date is filled in, HomeKeeper will automatically check the box for Completed Homebuyer Ed.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the date the applicant completed their homebuyer education requirements, or the date of the homebuyer education certificate. If this date is filled in, HomeKeeper will automatically check the box for Completed Homebuyer Ed.
CustomField.label: Date of Homebuyer Ed Certificate
